use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NEUROPATHIC PAIN ASSOCIATED WITH DIABETIC PERIPHERAL NEUROPATHY

indications.text:
LYRICA CR is indicated for the management of:
• Neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy
• Postherpetic neuralgia
Efficacy of LYRICA CR has not been established for the management of fibromyalgia or as adjunctive therapy
for adult patients with partial onset seizures.

LYRICA CR is indicated for the management of:
 Neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy
 Postherpetic neuralgia
Efficacy of LYRICA CR has not been established for the management of fibromyalgia or as adjunctive therapy
for adult patients with partial onset seizures.

LYRICA CR is indicated for the management of:
• Neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy
• Postherpetic neuralgia
Efficacy of LYRICA CR has not been established for the management of fibromyalgia or as
adjunctive therapy for adult patients with partial onset seizures.

LYRICA CR is indicated for the management of:
• Neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy
• Postherpetic neuralgia
Efficacy of LYRICA CR has not been established for the management of fibromyalgia or as adjunctive therapy
for adult patients with partial onset seizures.
